claims.text: LingoPlus was founded by Basel Layous, a graduate in Computer Science and Economics who has worked as a sworn translator and authorized interpreter since 2010.
claims.evidence: The company was founded by Basel Layous, a graduate in Computer Science and Economics who has worked as a sworn translator and authorized interpreter since 2010.

claims.text: LingoPlus has developed into a nationwide provider of certified translations, reflecting a growing demand for digital-first translation services across Germany.
claims.evidence: What began as a small translation initiative in 2010 has developed into a nationwide provider of certified translations.

claims.text: Basel Layous has founded several ventures, including the SaaS company Magnet Domain, bringing digital expertise and entrepreneurial experience to the translation industry.
claims.evidence: In addition to his work in the language services sector, he has founded several ventures, including the SaaS company Magnet Domain, bringing digital expertise and entrepreneurial experience to the translation industry.

claims.text: The AI infrastructure market is projected to reach USD 394.46 billion by 2030 from USD 135.81 billion in 2024, at a CAGR of 19.4%.
claims.evidence: The AI infrastructure market is projected to reach USD 394.46 billion by 2030 from USD 135.81 billion in 2024, at a CAGR of 19.4%.

claims.text: North America accounted for the largest AI infrastructure market share of 42.1% in 2025.
claims.evidence: North America accounted for the largest AI infrastructure market share of 42.1% in 2025.

claims.text: The AI infrastructure market is witnessing strong momentum, driven by accelerating adoption of data-intensive AI, deep learning, and generative AI workloads across enterprises and cloud environments.
claims.evidence: The AI infrastructure market is witnessing strong momentum, driven by accelerating adoption of data-intensive AI, deep learning, and generative AI workloads across enterprises and cloud environments.

claims.text: Export controls enacted by the United States in 2023 accelerated sovereign AI projects across the Middle East and Asia Pacific, indicating potential geopolitical risks in the market.
claims.evidence: Export controls enacted by the United States in 2023 accelerated sovereign AI projects across the Middle East and Asia Pacific.
